wiki.summary: Set In Stone cements slayr’s new direction with a hyperpop-electronic sound, offering a refreshing twist reminiscent of 2018’s musical energy, before throwing all of that away for a rock bridge. The instrumental, which was produced by slayr himself and waera, consists of glitchy synths, which are supported by a hard-hitting bass and fast-paced percussion, while the last chorus features rock elements, such as a guitar, e-bass and drums. Set In Stone would release as a single, on August 22, 2025. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: Set In Stone cements slayr’s new direction with a hyperpop-electronic sound, offering a refreshing twist reminiscent of 2018’s musical energy, before throwing all of that away for a rock bridge. The instrumental, which was produced by slayr himself and waera, consists of glitchy synths, which are supported by a hard-hitting bass and fast-paced percussion, while the last chorus features rock elements, such as a guitar, e-bass and drums. Set In Stone would release as a single, on August 22, 2025. The music video, which was directed and edited by hyveout, would release, on September 26, 2025. Read more on Last.fm.
